items.body: Static portfolio website for Enes Balaban.
items.title: Personal Portfolio Website
items.description: A minimal personal website for projects, notes, skills, and development progress.

items.title: BellEquation
items.description: BellEquation is a simple daily helper app. It focuses on organizing tasks, tracking small routines, and keeping everyday work more structured.

items.title: CloneBlast!
items.description: CloneBlast is a Star Wars-inspired browser arcade game with pixel-style visuals, fast action, animated assets, and multiple game modes.
